name: business-os
description: Business OS Workspace Setup — guides users to organize their local file workspace for AI/agentic use, generate a canonical Business OS folder of markdown files (Offers, Pipeline, Delivery, Proof, Ops, Learned, Scoreboard), and emit CLAUDE.md instruction files so AI agents know how to navigate. v1.1 adds: workspace-audit phase with Claude-safe boundaries, CLAUDE.md generation, inferred (not hard-coded) business calibration, and flexible file naming for portfolio businesses (real estate, STR, content, e-commerce).
